contact_engagement_score.name: Contact Engagement Score
contact_engagement_score.description: Use this trigger to initiate workflow when a contact's engagement score meets a specific condition

messaging_errors.name: Messaging Error - SMS
messaging_errors.description: Triggered based on the error received for an undelivered message. This can be used for taking relevant measures to clean the contact list eventually improving the delivery rate.

options.label: 30023 - US A2P 10DLC - Daily Message Cap Reached
21408 - Permission to Send SMS Not Enabled for Region
21614 - 'To' Number Is Not a Valid Mobile Number
30011 - MMS Not Supported by Recipient Number or Region

funnel_website_pageview.name: Funnel/Website PageView
funnel_website_pageview.description: Runs when a contact has viewed a page

quiz_submitted.name: Quiz Submitted
quiz_submitted.description: Runs when a quiz is submitted.

reputation_review_received.name: New Review Received
reputation_review_received.description: This trigger allows you to create automated actions when new reviews come in from Facebook or Google. You can filter these reviews based on various criteria to customise your workflow. This trigger is contactless, meaning the reviews are not linked to any specific contact.

new_prospect_received_workflow.name: Prospect Generated
new_prospect_received_workflow.description: This trigger allows you to create automated actions when new prospects are received. You can filter these prospects based on various criteria to customize your workflow. The trigger will only be executed once web report links are generated successfully after the prospect has been received and the filters have been matched.

whatsapp_referral.name: Click to WhatsApp Ads
whatsapp_referral.description: Triggers when an inbound WhatsApp message is received via a referral message.

external_tracking.name: External Tracking Event
external_tracking.description: Runs when external tracking form is viewed/submitted

service_booking.name: Service Booking
service_booking.description: Triggers the workflow when a Service Booking is created or updated.

rental_booking.name: Rental Booking
rental_booking.description: Triggers the workflow when a Rental Booking is created or updated.

affiliate_sales.name: New Affiliate Sales
affiliate_sales.description: Runs when a new sales transaction is recorded for an affiliate.

affiliate_campaign_enroll.name: Affiliate enrolled in campaign
affiliate_campaign_enroll.description: Runs when a Affiliate will be added in the campaign.

affiliate_new_lead.name: Lead Created
affiliate_new_lead.description: Runs when a new affiliate lead is created

subscription.name: Subscription
subscription.description: Runs when a new subscription is created or subscription status changes

refund.name: Refund
refund.description: Runs when a refund is initiated for a transaction

coupon_code_applied.name: Coupon Code Applied
coupon_code_applied.description: Fires when a coupon code is applied to an order during checkout, regardless of checkout completion.

coupon_redemption_limit_reached.name: Coupon Redemption Limit Reached
coupon_redemption_limit_reached.description: Fires when a coupon code reaches its maximum allowed number of redemptions. Should be triggered after the last coupon used transaction is completed.

coupon_code_expired.name: Coupon Code Expired
coupon_code_expired.description: Fires when a coupon code reaches its scheduled expiration date and becomes inactive.

coupon_code_redeemed.name: Coupon Code Redeemed
coupon_code_redeemed.description: Fires when a coupon code is successfully redeemed in a completed transaction.

group_access_revoked.name: Group Access Revoked
group_access_revoked.description: Triggers when a contact's access is revoked from community group's private channel

private_channel_access_granted.name: Private Channel Access Granted
private_channel_access_granted.description: Triggers when a contact is granted access to community group's private channel

private_channel_access_revoked.name: Private Channel Access Revoked
private_channel_access_revoked.description: Community Private Channel Access Revoked trigger
